name: 99_cross_residue
description: Cross-scenario probes that only make sense in cumulative mode — tests residue interactions between scenarios sharing one graph

steps.label: cross: 'Who is Sarah?' disambiguates across scenarios 10+40
steps.question: Who is Sarah on our team and what does she do?
required_facts: developer or CTO or lead dev

steps.label: cross: Sarah Kim (accountant) doesn't contaminate dev-Sarah query
steps.query: Who is Sarah on our engineering team?

steps.label: cross: current MRR survives scenario 30 retraction residue
steps.question: What is our current MRR?

steps.label: cross: retracted/hypothetical budget figures from sc30 don't contaminate MRR
cross: Sarah Chen entity not duplicated across scenarios 10+40
steps.query: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE toLower(e.name) CONTAINS 'sarah chen' RETURN e.name

steps.label: cross: headcount fact survives full graph residue
steps.question: How many people work at the company?

steps.label: cross: zero-debt preference survives venture-debt distractor
steps.question: What is Adam's stance on taking on debt or borrowing?
